data.title: NovaBridge will present new data on ragistomig at ESMO-IO with Abstract #688 by co-developer ABL Bio on Dec 10th at 5:30 PM.
data.description: NovaBridge Biosciences (Nasdaq: NBP), a biotechnology platform company, announced new data from the expanded Phase 1 dosing study of ragistomig, a 4-1BB X PD-L1 bispecific antibody. The data will be presented at the ESMO-IO 2025 by ABL Bio. Poster (Abstract #688) to be presented by Gerald Falchook, MD, Director of Sarah Cannon Research Institute at HealthONE Denver, on December 10th at 5:30 PM GMT.
30-year Japanese government bond yield climbed 2.5 basis points to 3.445%, hitting a historic peak.
Australia Imports (M/M): 2.0% (prev 1.1%; prevR 1.8%)
USD/JPY declines below 155.50 on weaker US jobs data, rising BoJ rate hike-FX

data.title: Cognite relocates HQ to Arizona, marking growth milestone and commitment to US with grand opening.
data.description: Cognite, a top Industrial AI company, has recently opened its new global headquarters in Tempe, Arizona, signaling a significant move from Oslo, Norway. This shift emphasizes the company's dedication to the North American market and growth strategy. The CEO expressed enthusiasm about the relocation, stating that positioning Cognite in Arizona will place them at the heart of American innovation and manufacturing.
Australia’s stock market rose slightly, supported by miners hitting new all-time highs.
Downdetector data shows users are reporting problems with Venmo.
United States has listed a 15% tariff on South Korean autos in the Federal Register, applied retroactively to November 1.

data.title: Monument Mining reports first 16 drill hole results of Selinsing Mine expansion drilling program in Malaysia.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 3, 2025, Monument Mining Limited shared positive news regarding their first BR/Felda mine expansion drilling program. The company revealed results from 16 drill holes and provided an update on mine expansion drilling efforts at the Selinsing Gold Mine. This includes progress at the Selinsing and Buffalo Reef gold projects situated in Pahang State, on the Central Gold Belt of Western Malaysia. Monument Mining Limited is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange (TSX-V: MMY) and the Frankfurt Stock Exchange (FSE: D7Q1).

data.title: Regentis Biomaterials Ltd. prices IPO at $8 per share, raising $10M with 1.25M shares sold, with an option for +187,500 shares.
data.description: Regentis Biomaterials Ltd., a regenerative medicine company based in Herzliya, Israel, has announced the pricing of its initial public offering on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol RGNT. The offering consists of 1,250,000 ordinary shares priced at $8.00 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of $10,000,000. The company has also granted the underwriters a 45-day option to purchase an additional 187,500 shares to cover any over-allotments. Regentis aims to use these proceeds to further develop innovative tissue repair solutions to improve patients' quality of life.

data.title: "2025 MA Conference for Women features 11,000 attendees, keynote speakers like Biles, Robbins, and Stewart."
data.description: Prominent figures such as Simone Biles, Mel Robbins, and Martha Stewart headlined a sold-out event in Boston on December 3, 2025. The event attracted 11,000 attendees, with highlights including Diana Nyad energizing the crowd with a trumpet and leading a chant of "onward," as well as Jesse Israel guiding participants in a meditative sound healing session. Photos from the event can be downloaded for viewing.
Yields on Japan’s 30-year bonds remain near all-time highs as the country prepares for its next debt sale.

data.title: Crypto wallet company uncovers vulnerability in Mediatek Dimensity 7300 chip, prone to unpatchable attacks at root level.
data.description: A recent report from a leading crypto wallet provider highlights a concerning finding that a Mediatek Dimensity 7300 chip may be vulnerable to compromise at its most basic level.
